mapper.select: SELECT id, template_id, phase_code, phase_name, sort_order, deliverables, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM project_template_phase WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.update: UPDATE project_template_phase SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND deleted = 0
